# Digitalized Plantation

> Digitalized Plantation is an AgriTech startup, incubated at Pakistan's National Incubation Center (NIC), building IoT-powered indoor growth chambers with AI-driven climate control, automated irrigation, UV light control, and real-time environmental monitoring. Its working prototype achieved a 90%+ germination success rate, making controlled-environment agriculture climate-resilient, scalable, and data-driven for Pakistan and beyond.

## About

- **Founded:** 2024
- **Founder & CEO:** Safi Ullah (CS student at IMSciences, IoT Systems Architect)
- **Status:** Incubated at the National Incubation Center (NIC), Pakistan
- **Website:** https://digitalizedplantation.garden
- **Contact:** safiu2543@gmail.com · WhatsApp +92 319 2291320
- **YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@DIGITALIZEDPLANTATION

## What It Does

Digitalized Plantation automates plant growth inside controlled environments using IoT hardware and embedded intelligence. A closed-loop system continuously monitors temperature, humidity, soil moisture, and light intensity, then autonomously triggers irrigation pumps, UV grow-lights, and climate-regulation fans to keep plants in their optimal growth window — without manual intervention.

A side-by-side prototype (an IoT-monitored chamber vs. an unmonitored control) demonstrates visibly taller, denser growth in the monitored unit, validating the approach.

## System Features

- **Smart Monitoring** — Multi-sensor arrays track all environmental parameters in real time.
- **Automated Irrigation** — Precision pumps trigger only when soil moisture drops below threshold.
- **UV Light Control** — Automated grow-light cycles calibrated per growth stage.
- **Climate Regulation** — Fans and heating elements maintain the ideal microclimate automatically.
- **IoT Connectivity** — ESP32 WiFi enables remote monitoring and over-the-air updates.
- **Alert System** — Instant alerts when any parameter deviates from safe thresholds.

## Technology Stack

- **Microcontrollers:** ESP32 (WiFi IoT), Arduino Uno (sensor control)
- **Sensors:** DHT11 (temperature & humidity), soil moisture sensor, LDR (light intensity)
- **Actuators:** Relay modules, water pump (precision irrigation), UV full-spectrum grow lights, fans
- **Backend & Dashboard:** Python, Flask, PostgreSQL
- **Live dashboard:** Real-time control panel showing temperature, humidity, soil moisture, and light intensity

## How It Works

1. Sensors (DHT11, soil moisture, LDR, temperature) sample continuously.
2. ESP32 and Arduino ingest readings and compare against optimal thresholds.
3. Embedded decision logic evaluates parameters and queues corrective actions.
4. Relay modules switch on pumps, UV lights, or fans as needed.
5. The regulated environment achieves 90%+ germination success.

## Achievements

- 90% germination success rate in prototype testing
- 200+ IT and medical students trained on climate change and digital solutions
- Incubated at the National Incubation Center (NIC)
- Participant in the PYLI WASH Youth-Led Action Program

## Opportunities

- **Investment:** Actively seeking investors and incubation partners. Live prototype, proven results, and a clear roadmap toward indoor farms and a SaaS platform.
- **Custom Chambers:** Designs and builds custom IoT-powered growth chambers for homes, offices, schools, and farms — with full sensor integration, automated irrigation, UV lighting, and phone-based remote monitoring.
